spell.frierens_spellbooks.tornado.guide: Around a targeted location, create a tornado that will suck in nearby creatures and propulse them in the air
spell.frierens_spellbooks.iron_slash.gui: Focus yourself before doing a big dash that slash your enemies
spell.frierens_spellbooks.aeropic.guide: Leap forward in a spinning, voltaic attack that will damage your first target and launch you into the air. As long as you hit your target, the attack can be repeated.
Create a area of wind around you knocking back creatures in every directions, causing damage if they impact a wall
spell.frierens_spellbooks.wind_blade.gui: Slash forward to send out a concentrated blade of wind, slicing through creatures
spell.frierens_spellbooks.tailwind.guide: Imbue yourself with the strength of the wind, increasing your speed and your mobility in the air.
death.attack.frierens_spellbooks.tornado: %1$s was crushed by %2$s's tornado while using %3$s
death.attack.frierens_spellbooks.iron_sl: %1$s life was severed by %2$s while using %3$s
death.attack.frierens_spellbooks.aeropic: %1$s was beaten up by %2$s while using %3$s
